subject.name: FeatureCard
subject.purpose: A single feature in a 3-up feature grid; icon + title + body + optional link.

exemplars_say: It does the boring part so you don't.

behavior: Icon top, title below, body below that; optional 'Learn more' link at the bottom
On hover, the card gains a subtle elevation

accessibility.keyboard_nav: if href present, whole card is a single focusable link with visible focus ring

instructions_for_external_tool: You are generating a component named FeatureCard. Purpose: a single feature in a 3-up grid. You MUST use ONLY the design tokens provided in brand_context — do not invent colors, fonts, or spacing values; prefer the project's shadcn CSS-variable theme tokens (bg-card, text-foreground, text-primary) which map to the brand OKLCH palette. Framework: react + shadcn + tailwind. Return code only. Single file. Accessibility: title is an h3; 4.5:1 body contrast; if href present make the whole card one focusable link with a visible focus ring.
